sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Mittaw khuamial pi sungah om ingh
Leitung nop sakna te mu loh mah leng
To Zeisu kiang ah ka tun hun ciangin
Mit taw khel bai om lo Jerusalem thak ah

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Ki pak in lasa ding Haleluijah ci-in
Aw ken ngah lah lua in tua mun nuam bel
To Zeisu kiang ah ka tun hun ciang in
Mit taw khel bai om lo Jerusalem thak ah

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Khel bai khut bui in mel siam gawp in
Hong honpa kiangah ka tun hun ciang in
Mi poi mi phak om lo Jerusalem thak ah

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Git loh tawh ki dim hih leitung hi
Ka mel in ni sangin tang zaw mah leh
Tawntung nuntak na munnuam ka luah ciang
Git loh huai ham na te
Ken ngai ngei nawn kei ning
